chunks.memory_unit_text: In the directus/directus release v11.8.0, the project introduces new features and improvements including applying configured display format to the kanban layout, enhancing flow trigger buttons with custom colors, adding color indications and a failed-only filter to flow logs, fixing permissions handling in the Files module, and adding a toggle for variable input on _in and _nin filters. Bug fixes address field validation in relational drawers, filters and relation creation for file interfaces, clarity for Readonly and Required options, a togglable v-list-group in storybook, invalid color values in select color field, a primaryKey data attribute on form fields, permissions handling in the Files module, and loss of ID for newly added M2M/M2A items after editing a junction field. The utils package fixes value coercion, types adds ws activity fields, and env ensures ADMIN_PASSWORD, ADMIN_TOKEN, KEY, and SECRET are always interpreted as strings.

Repository: directus/directus
Release: v11.9.0
Tag: v11.9.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-25T18:01:18Z; created_at: 2025-06-25T17:58:44Z
Release notes:
### ⚠️ Potential Breaking Changes
**Added support for LDAP login and enhanced parameter consistency for refresh/logout commands. Allowed overriding the mode in refresh and logout commands to be inline with login ([#25132](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25132))**
The `login` method now accepts a payload object instead of separate email and password parameters.
This enables support for both standard and LDAP authentication, but requires updates to code that previously called `sdk.login(email, password)`.
The new usage is `sdk.login({ email, password })` or `sdk.login({ identifier, password })` for LDAP.
The `refresh` and `logout` command method parameters have been updated to be consistent across usage. The functions now accept an options object instead of their previous regular parameters.
For example the new usage for `refresh` is `sdk.request(refresh({ mode: "json", refresh_token }))` instead of `sdk.request(refresh('json', refresh_token))`.
- **@directus/api**
- Fixed manual flows to only trigger with appropriate permissions ([#25354](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25354) by @br41nslug)
- **@directus/sdk**
- Added support for LDAP login and enhanced parameter consistency for refresh/logout commands. Allowed overriding the mode in refresh and logout commands to be inline with login ([#25132](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25132) by @ComfortablyCoding)
- **@directus/extensions-sdk**
- Update to Rollup v4 ([#25035](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25035) by @abdonrd)
### ✨ New Features & Improvements
- **@directus/app**
- Added Keyboard Accessibility ([#25214](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25214) by @formfcw)
- Improved the UX of the field permissions by changing its interface to a checkbox tree ([#25253](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25253) by @formfcw)

- Added `backlink` query parameter to exclude back-relations when expanding `*.*` in the fields query parameter ([#25284](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25284) by @Nitwel)
- **@directus/composables**

- **@directus/sdk**
- Added `backlink` query parameter to exclude back-relations when expanding `*.*` in the fields query parameter ([#25284](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25284) by @Nitwel)
- **@directus/types**

### 🐛 Bug Fixes & Optimizations
- **@directus/app**
- Added BSL license banner to display for first admin user ([#25299](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25299) by @AlexGaillard)
- Fixed system filters showing null ([#25294](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25294) by @br41nslug)
- Ensured to revert changes on error after drag & drop in kanban and calendar layout ([#25329](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25329) by @formfcw)
- Prevented table column widths from having null values ([#25298](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25298) by @robluton)
- Ensured that the redirection to the collection view after editing an item takes the bookmark query into account ([#25327](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25327) by @formfcw)

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the directus/directus release v11.9.0, potential breaking changes include added support for LDAP login and enhanced parameter consistency for refresh/logout commands, requiring the login method to accept a payload object instead of separate parameters, and updating refresh and logout to accept an options object. The API fixes manual flows to only trigger with appropriate permissions, the SDK adds LDAP support and parameter consistency, and the extensions-sdk updates to Rollup v4. New features include keyboard accessibility in the app, improved field permissions UX with a checkbox tree, new OpenID environment variables (AUTH_.+_ISSUER_DISCOVERY_MUST_SUCCEED and AUTH_.+_CLIENT_HTTP), and a backlink query parameter to exclude back-relations when expanding *.*. Bug fixes add a BSL license banner for the first admin user, fix system filters showing null, ensure changes are reverted on error after drag & drop in kanban and calendar layouts, prevent null table column widths, ensure redirection after editing an item respects bookmark queries, and allow selecting custom collections for item permissions.

Repository: directus/directus
Release: v11.10.0
Tag: v11.10.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-07-30T17:50:18Z; created_at: 2025-07-30T17:12:15Z
Release notes:
### ⚠️ Potential Breaking Changes
**Exclude database-only tables from snapshots ([#25271](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25271))**
Snapshots now exclude tables not tracked in `directus_collections` (database-only tables).
| Source Version | Target Version | Behavior                                                   | Impact                                       |
| -------------- | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| < 11.10.0      | ≥ 11.10.0      | Database-only tables from source will be created on target | ⚠️ Tables added                              |
| ≥ 11.10.0      | < 11.10.0      | Database-only tables will be dropped from target           | 🚨 Data loss risk                            |
| ≥ 11.10.0      | ≥ 11.10.0      | Database-only tables are ignored in snapshots              | ✅ No changes                                |
| < 11.10.0      | < 11.10.0      | Database-only tables may be created or dropped             | ⚠️ Depends on the diff between source/target |
Please review your snapshot workflows to ensure these changes will not result in unexpected behaviour.
- **@directus/api**
- Fixed replacing process.env.NODE_ENV on backend extensions ([#25180](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25180) by @Nitwel)
- Exclude database-only tables from snapshots ([#25271](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25271) by @Nitwel)
- **@directus/extensions-sdk**
- Upgraded all dependencies of @directus/extensions-sdk to the latest major versions of Rollup and Vite, and resolved several false-positive security reports.   ([#25486](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25486) by @rijkvanzanten)
⚠️ This change also raises the minimum supported Node.js version to **20.19.0**.
- Fixed replacing process.env.NODE_ENV on backend extensions ([#25180](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25180) by @Nitwel)
### ✨ New Features & Improvements

- Added Stylelint and refactored the styles to take advantage of logical properties ([#25370](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25370) by @formfcw)

- Added `websocket.authenticate` filter hook ([#25344](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25344) by @8byr0)
- **@directus/system-data**

### 🐛 Bug Fixes & Optimizations
- **@directus/app**
- Fixed an issue that could cause the notifications to be rendered in the wrong location ([#25499](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25499) by @formfcw)
- Added copy id to file details panel in sidebar ([#25434](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25434) by @robluton)

- Ensured that relational interfaces could reset their saved edits in version...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the directus/directus release v11.10.0, potential breaking changes include excluding database-only tables from snapshots, which may cause tables to be created or dropped depending on source and target versions. The API fixes replacing process.env.NODE_ENV on backend extensions and implements the snapshot exclusion. The extensions-sdk upgrades all dependencies to latest major versions of Rollup and Vite, raising the minimum Node.js version to 20.19.0, and fixes process.env.NODE_ENV replacement. New features add RTL rendering support in the studio, Stylelint and logical properties refactoring, a code tool in the WYSIWYG editor, custom validation rule execution in overlays, improved custom validation message handling, and accessibility improvements for anchors, iframes, labels, and roles. The API adds a websocket.authenticate filter hook. Bug fixes address notification rendering location, add copy ID to file details panel, update material symbols font, ensure relational interfaces can reset saved edits in versioning, and other optimizations.

Release notes:
### ⚠️ Potential Breaking Changes
**Added TypeScript support for services within the extension context ([#25368](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25368))**
The services exposed to API extensions using TypeScript are now fully typed instead of `any`, which may cause new type errors when building extensions.
Arguments of service methods are now strictly typed, which can result in type errors for broader types that would not error before:
- The ItemsService constructor now expects the collection name to be a `string` and will error on `string | undefined` (or other unions).
- Similarly, functions like `service.readOne()`/`service.readMany()` now expect `string | number` for their primary keys and will error for nullable types
As a workaround, casting the services back to `any` will result in the original behavior. However, it is recommended to resolve the type errors instead.
- **@directus/extensions-sdk**
- Added TypeScript support for services within the extension context ([#25368](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25368) by @that1matt)
### ✨ New Features & Improvements
- **@directus/app**
- Added new error operation to Flows ([#25558](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25558) by @licitdev)
- **@directus/api**
- Added new error operation to Flows ([#25558](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25558) by @licitdev)
- Added support for `private_key_jwt` auth method in OpenID driver ([#25644](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25644) by @licitdev)
- Added the ability to override the email `from` property ([#25459](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25459) by @jekuer)

- Fixed an issue for empty states not being centered in RTL languages ([#25636](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25636) by @that1matt)
- Enabled text selection in the studio ([#25510](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25510) by @gloriarodrife)
- Fixed an issue where the theme overrides interface would be rendered RTL in RTL languages ([#25633](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25633) by @rijkvanzanten)
- Fixed an issue that would render english code as RTL in RTL language mode ([#25641](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25641) by @rijkvanzanten)
- Fixed an issue that would cause the code editor interface to fail when the language prop was set to null ([#25595](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25595) by @copilot-swe-agent)
- Fix v-resizeable dragging for RTL vs LTR ([#25659](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25659) by @AlexGaillard)
- Added TypeScript support for services within the extension context ([#25368](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25368) by @that1matt)
- Upgraded dependencies ([#25583](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25583) by @rijkvanzanten)
- Fixed an issue that would cause the table header columns to resize in the wrong direction when using rtl languages ([#25631](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25631) by @rijkvanzanten)
- Ensured that labels for data fields always display in batch mode ([#25619](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25619) by @formfcw)
- Updated dependency form-data ([#25579](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25579) by @ComfortablyCoding)
- Standardized batch mode for raw group fields ([#25600](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25600) by @timio23)

- Added TypeScript support for services within the extension context ([#25368](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25368) by @that1matt...

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: directus/directus
Release: v11.11.0
Tag: v11.11.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-08-27T19:16:21Z; created_at: 2025-08-27T18:04:33Z
Release notes:
### ⚠️ Potential Breaking Changes
**Fixed `Content Versioning` to correctly merge relational data and support all query parameter functionality ([#25437](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25437))**
The following changes should be kept in mind when updating:
1. Relational versioned data now requires explicit field expansion to be included in the response.
2. Invalid data (e.g. Fails validation rules) will error on query
3. Filter conditions now apply to the versioned data instead of the main record
4. For more information, please read the [breaking change docs](https://directus.io/docs/releases/breaking-changes/version-11#version-11110) for a full list of changes.
Additionally there will be further breaking changes to `USER_CREATED`, `USER_UPDATED`, `DATE_CREATED`, `DATE_UPDATED` default values in a followup PR to improve this behavior further.
Check in with https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25744 to see more info about the breaking changes.
### ✨ New Features & Improvements
- **@directus/api**
- Fixed `Content Versioning` to correctly merge relational data and support all query parameter functionality ([#25437](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25437) by @Nitwel)
- **@directus/app**
- Fixed links in WYSIWYG missing underline and pointer cursor styling ([#25739](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25739) by @Abdallah-Awwad)
- Added a new field to conditions for clearing hidden fields on save ([#25646](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25646) by @robluton)
### 🐛 Bug Fixes & Optimizations
- **@directus/app**
- Fixed timestamp fields being incorrectly marked as changed due to timezone mismatch ([#25718](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25718) by @khanahmad4527)
- Fixed code button state not updating when exiting code mode in WYSIWYG ([#25741](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/25741) by @Abdallah-Awwad)

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the directus/directus release v11.11.0, potential breaking changes fix Content Versioning to correctly merge relational data and support all query parameter functionality, requiring explicit field expansion for relational versioned data, erroring on invalid data, and applying filter conditions to versioned data instead of the main record. The API implements this fix. New features include fixing WYSIWYG link styling and adding a new field to conditions for clearing hidden fields on save. chunks.memory_unit_text: In the directus/directus release v11.14.0, potential breaking changes remove sidebar states from the app store. New features add support for downloading multiple files and entire folder trees, an AI chat sidebar, support for float intervals and min/max warnings for number inputs, resizable sidebars, and a header interface. Release notes:
### ⚠️ Potential Breaking Changes
**Added support for importing data in the background ([#26914](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/26914))**
Imports now automatically time out after 1 hour, with a maximum of 20 running concurrently. These limits can be configured via `IMPORT_TIMEOUT` and `IMPORT_MAX_CONCURRENCY`, respectively.
**Improved build times using `tsdown`’s `oxc-transform` ([#26604](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/26604))**
Exports previously available from `@directus/types/collab` are now exported directly from `@directus/types`
**Shrunk app UI to 90% and converted all px to rem (16px browser default) ([#26826](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/26826))**
Potential breaking change: The app UI has been shrunk to 90% of its previous size. Extensions that rely on hardcoded px values or the old 14px root font-size may render incorrectly — all app sizing now uses rem based on the 16px browser default.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the directus/directus release v11.17.0, potential breaking changes include adding support for importing data in the background with configurable timeout and concurrency, improving build times using tsdown's oxc-transform (moving collab exports to @directus/types), and shrinking the app UI to 90% and converting all px to rem (16px browser default), which may affect extensions relying on hardcoded px values. chunks.raw_text:
Repository: directus/directus
Release: Directus v12.0.0-rc.1
Tag: v12.0.0-rc.1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-29T12:56:10Z; created_at: 2026-05-29T12:46:01Z
Release notes:
### ⚠️ Potential Breaking Changes
**Introduced VERSION_KEY_* constants and renamed main to published @alvarosabu ([#27397](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/27397))**
Backward Compatibility: You can now use `?version=published` to resolve versions of the main item(s) via the version query parameter. For backward compatibility, `?version=main` will continue to work.
**Replaced status field with archived boolean in collection settings @alvarosabu ([#27397](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/27397))**
Backward Compatibility: Existing collections with string-based status fields continue to work unchanged; newly created collections now default to a boolean "Archived" field instead of the string "Status" field
**Deprecated the `VResizeable` component @formfcw ([#27437](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/27437))**
- Deprecation for extensions: The globally registered `VResizeable` component has been deprecated. Extension authors using `<v-resizeable>` should migrate to `@directus/vue-split-panel` or their own implementation.
**Updated type system, borders, and theme variables @formfcw ([#27437](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/27437))**
- Potential breaking change for theme extensions: headerShadow and sidebarShadow removed from LayoutConfig interface
- Potential breaking change for theme extensions: boxShadow removed from header theme rules schema
- Potential breaking change for theme extensions: sidebarShadow no longer exposed in layout wrapper state
**Updated module navigation bar spacing and styling @HZooly ([#27437](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/27437))**
- Potential breaking change in theme extensions: Removed `navigation.project.borderColor` / `navigation.project.borderWidth` / `navigation.project.background` from theming. No action is required — these props will simply no longer have any effect.
**Locked published items in versioned collections from editing and added a header action button to edit in the draft version @alvarosabu ([#27397](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/27397))**
- **Breaking change — new behavior for versioned collections** Published items in versioned collections are now locked. Edits must be made through the draft version.
**Removed rounded buttons and adopted shared header action button across all views @formfcw ([#27437](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/27437))**
- Potential breaking change for extensions: The `rounded` prop has been removed from `v-button`. Extensions using `rounded` will still render correctly but buttons will appear as rounded rectangles instead of circles. No functional impact.
**Changed license to MSCL-1.0-GPL ([#27417](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/27417))**
- Breaking Change: Relicensed from BUSL-1.1 to MSCL-1.0-GPL (Monospace Sustainable Core License, Version 1.0).
**Updated header and navigation bar base design and merged their theme properties into a new shell scope @formfcw ([#27437](https://github.com/directus/directus/pull/27437))**
- Potential breaking change for theme extensions: The theme properties `navigation.background`, `navigation.backgroundAccent`, `navigation.borderWidth`, `navigation.borderColor`, `header.background`, `header.borderWidth`, and `header.borderColor` have been removed and replaced by `shell.background`, `shell.backgroundAccent`, `shell.borderWidth`, and `shell.borderColor`.
- Potential breaking change for theme extensions: Custom themes overriding any of these removed properties must migrate to the new `shell` scope. The corresponding CSS variables change from `--theme--navigation--background`, `--theme--navigation--background-accent`, `--theme--navigation--border-*`, `--theme--header--background`, and `--theme--header--border-*` to `--theme--shell--background`, `--theme--shell--ba...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the directus/directus release v12.0.0-rc.1, potential breaking changes include introducing VERSION_KEY_* constants and renaming main to published (with backward compatibility for ?version=main), replacing the status field with an archived boolean in collection settings, deprecating the VResizeable component, updating the type system, borders, and theme variables (removing headerShadow, sidebarShadow, boxShadow, and navigation.project theme properties), updating module navigation bar spacing and styling, locking published items in versioned collections from editing and adding a header action button to edit in the draft version, removing rounded buttons and adopting a shared header action button, changing the license to MSCL-1.0-GPL, and updating header and navigation bar base design with merged theme properties into a new shell scope.

Added deployment module for triggering deployments from Directus with Vercel as first supported provider
